name: Test-ModuleManifest

options.name: -Path
options.description: Specifies a path and file name for the manifest file. Enter an optional path and name of the module manifest file that has the `.psd1` file name extension. The default location is the current directory. Wildcard characters are supported, but must resolve to a single module manifest file. This parameter is required. You can also pipe a path to `Test-ModuleManifest`.

args.name: -Path
args.description: Specifies a path and file name for the manifest file. Enter an optional path and name of the module manifest file that has the `.psd1` file name extension. The default location is the current directory. Wildcard characters are supported, but must resolve to a single module manifest file. This parameter is required. You can also pipe a path to `Test-ModuleManifest`.

description: Verifies that a module manifest file accurately describes the contents of a module.
